note.FR: DEF +100%. 50% de chance de reduire le Bouclier ennemi de 350% de la DEF.
note.EN: DEF +100%. 50% chance to decrease target's Shield by 350% of DEF.

note.FR: Duree de competence +36%. Maximise l'uptime de la barriere.
Duree de competence +30%. Les CRITs donnent aleatoirement un buff aux allies pendant 16s.
note.EN: Skill Duration +30%. CRITs randomly grant allies a buff for 16s.

note.FR: Duree de competence +36%. Option distance alternative.
Focus DEF + Duree de competence. 3x Standfast Eternity pour maximiser le scaling DEF.
note.EN: Focus DEF + Skill Duration. 3x Standfast Eternity to maximize DEF scaling.

note.FR: DPS principal. Randy le protege avec sa barriere frontale.
note.EN: Main DPS. Randy protects him with his frontal barrier.

note.FR: Soins, Intensite de competence et recuperation de Lucidite.
note.EN: Healing, Skill Intensity and Sanity recovery.

note.FR: Deploie une barriere frontale bloquant les projectiles. A monter en priorite absolue.
note.EN: Deploys a frontal barrier blocking projectiles. Prioritize maxing this skill.

note.FR: Cree des boucliers et accorde un Ultra Bouclier a toute l'equipe.
note.EN: Creates shields and grants Ultra Shield to the entire team.

note.FR: Passif donnant de la DEF aux coequipiers. Priorite basse.
note.EN: Passive granting DEF to teammates. Low priority.

notes.FR: Randy est un tank/support qui absorbe les degats et protege ses coequipiers. Sa barriere frontale bloque les projectiles et applique le debuff Rancune du Surmenage. Attention : il ne peut pas bouger pendant que la barriere est active. Focus DEF + Duree de competence. Excellent en coop grace a sa protection de zone.
notes.EN: Randy is a tank/support who absorbs damage and protects teammates. His frontal barrier blocks projectiles and applies the Overwork Grudge debuff. Note: he cannot move while the barrier is active. Focus DEF + Skill Duration. Excellent in co-op thanks to zone protection.
